title: juncus supinus subsp. eusupinus
intro: Juncus supinus subsp. eusupinus, also known as the creeping rush, is a type of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. It is a perennial herb that grows in wetland areas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juncus supinus subsp. eusupinus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce swelling, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
